See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 822 => 'Seoul', 8231 => 'Gyeonggi', 8232 => 'Incheon', 8233 => 'Gangwon', 8241 => 'Chungnam', 8242 => 'Daejeon', 8243 => 'Chungbuk', 8244 => 'Sejong City', 8251 => 'Busan', 8252 => 'Ulsan', 8253 => 'Daegu', 8254 => 'Gyeongbuk', 8255 => 'Gyeongnam', 8261 => 'Jeonnam', 8262 => 'Gwangju', 8263 => 'Jeonbuk', 8264 => 'Jeju', ];
